description_long: This is a four-story urban hotel with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The facade is painted a deep magenta with beige trim at the base and around the windows, which are symmetrically arranged in three vertical rows. A large green sign reading 'HOTEL' is mounted on the roof above the main entrance, which is accentuated by a red-and-white striped fabric awning. The front entrance is accessed by a small set of steps, and the ground floor features large windows, suggesting a lobby or reception area. The roof also includes two small HVAC units, and the side and rear walls are plain with additional windows but no decorative features.
description: A four-story magenta hotel with a green rooftop 'HOTEL' sign, striped awning over the entrance, and symmetrical windows. The building has a flat roof and a simple, urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped awning, main entrance steps, large windows, and the green 'HOTEL' sign on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying plain magenta walls, four windows, and the edge of the rooftop sign and awning.
description_view_2: Rear view with no windows or doors, just a solid magenta and beige wall and the reverse of the rooftop sign.
description_view_3: Right side view with four windows and a partial view of the awning and rooftop sign.
attribute_hotel_signage: Large green 'HOTEL' sign mounted on the roof above the entrance.
attribute_entrance_canopy: Red-and-white striped fabric awning above the main entrance.
